subcodes.first_line: A hundred thousand praises and thanksgivings be unto the Desired One, for though outward presence and meeting depend upon material means [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: صد هزار بار شکر و حمد حضرت مقصود را که اگر حضور و لقای ظاهری نظر باسباب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
